name: SmartOnFhirV2CapabilityStatementDeclaresSmart
title: SMART on FHIR v2 — CapabilityStatement.rest.security declares SMART
description: Per SMART App Launch IG v2 §5.1.1, servers SHALL declare SMART support in CapabilityStatement.rest.security via either the SMART-on-FHIR service coding (system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/restful-security-service) OR the oauth-uris extension URL (http://fhir-registry.smarthealthit.org/StructureDefinition/oauth-uris). This test passes if either declaration is present — matching the spec's 'OR' rather than demanding a specific implementation choice. The IG canonical URL 'http://hl7.org/fhir/smart-app-launch' is NOT itself the declaration URI; only its two child artifacts (the service coding and the oauth-uris extension) are.

test.name: /metadata declares SMART via service coding or oauth-uris extension

assert.label: responseBody declares SMART-on-FHIR security service coding or oauth-uris extension URL
